idea-plugin.name: Smear Cursor
idea-plugin.description:
Animate the cursor with a smear effect, inspired by Neovide's animated cursor.

Creates a smooth, trailing animation when the cursor moves across the editor.

Features:

  • Smooth cursor animation with spring physics
  • Configurable animation speed and stiffness
  • Color gradient trail effect
  • Optional particle effects
  • Works across all editor windows

Usage:

Enable/disable via Settings → Editor → Smear Cursor, or use the toolbar toggle.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Smear cursor animation with spring physics
  • Configurable settings
  • Particle effects support

action.description: Enable or disable smear cursor animation
